sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method using 20-day moving average and 20-day sample variance of daily log returns to dynamically adjust position sizing inversely to volatility. Specific optimal_f value derived from variance calculation but not quantified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use a 20-day moving average and 20-day sample variance of daily returns to dynamically adjust position sizing based on recent volatility and performance dispersion.
